pages.title: Welcome, Hunter
pages.text: The realm of $(rune)Ascendant$() is no quiet frontier. Villages need protectors, the Guild keeps the ledger of who is worth their salt, and the roads between are thick with $(em)contracts, rivals, and worse$().$(br2)You begin as $(soft)nobody$() — $(gold)Unranked$(). What you become is written by what you survive.

pages.title: The Loop
pages.text: $(rune)Explore$() to find settlements and danger.$(br)$(rune)Hunt$() the contracts on each $(gold)Hunter Board$().$(br)$(rune)Grow$() — every level earns a $(gold)skill point$().$(br)$(rune)Rank up$() by proving yourself to the Guild.$(br2)$(soft)The world explains itself through play. This book is only your first lantern.$()

pages.title: — The Guild
pages.text: Your name matters when people know what you survived.
